name: jmdurant/oe-module-outreach
description: Patient outreach platform — multi-channel (SMS/email/push) reminder, confirmation, and notification dispatch with central tracking, rate-limit, opt-out, and audit. Concerns from other modules (appointment confirmation, post-visit superbill, balance reminders, questionnaire reminders, etc.) plug in via an OutreachConcernRegistryEvent fired at boot.
